zh.lifeSummary: 當Hannah Fosdick於大約1615年出生在英國素福爾可格亞特 文哈姆時，她的父親Stephen Fosdick32歲，母親Anna Harre30歲。她於1635年與Palmer Tingley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈爾斯托結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1681年7月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登享年67歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hannah Fosdick于大约1615年出生在英国素福爾可格亞特 文哈姆时，她的父亲Stephen Fosdick32岁，母亲Anna Harre30岁。她于1635年与Palmer Tingley在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼哈爾斯托结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1681年7月1日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可馬爾登享年67岁。

nameMeanings.name: Fosdick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Fosdyke, Lincolnshire, so called from the genitive case of the Old English byname Fōt, meaning ‘foot’ (or the Old Norse cognate Fótr), + Old English dīc ‘ditch, dike’ (see Ditch ). This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Ditch
meanings: English (Kent and Sussex): topographic name for someone who lived by a ditch, from Middle English dich(e), deche ‘ditch, dike’ (Old English dīc). Compare Dyke .

nameMeanings.name: Hannah
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, borne by the mother of the prophet Samuel (1 Samuel 1:2), Hebrew Hanna. It is derived from a Hebrew word meaning ‘He (i.e. God) has favoured me (i.e. with a child)’. See also Anne . This form of the name was taken up as a given name by the Puritans in the 16th and 17th centuries and remained popular until the late 19th century. Thereafter it fell somewhat from favour but has enjoyed a massive revival since the 1990s.

variants.name: Hanna
meanings: Either the biblical name ( see Hannah ) or a short form of Johanna .

variants.name: Hana
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Hannah Fosdick was born about 1615, in Great Wenham, Suffolk, England, her father, Stephen Fosdick, was 32 and her mother, Anna Harre, was 30. She married Palmer Tingley in 1635, in Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died on 1 July 1681, in Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 67.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hannah Fosdick est née environ 1615, à Great Wenham, Suffolk, Angleterre, son père, Stephen Fosdick, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Anna Harre, avait 30 ans. Elle a épousé Palmer Tingley en 1635, à Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée le 1 juillet 1681, à Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 67 ans.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Fosdick è nata il circa 1615 nel Great Wenham, Suffolk, England, sua padre, Stephen Fosdick, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Anna Harre, aveva 30 anni. Lei sposato Palmer Tingley nel 1635, nel Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 1 luglio 1681, nel Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 67 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Hannah Fosdickが約1615年にイギリススフォルクグレアト ウエンハムで生まれた時，父Stephen Fosdickは32歳，母Anna Harreは30歳であった。1635年にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーチャーレストウンでPalmer Tingleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1681年7月1日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスマルデンで67歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Hannah Fosdick(이)가 대략 1615년 영국 수폴크 그리트 웬함에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Stephen Fosdick(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Harre(은)는 30세였다. 그녀는 1635년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 찰레스타운에서 Palmer Tingley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1681년 7월 1일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 맬든에서 67세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hannah Fosdick nasceu aproximadamente 1615, em Great Wenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, seu pai, Stephen Fosdick, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Anna Harre, tinha 30 anos. Ela casou-se com Palmer Tingley em 1635, em Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ela faleceu em 1 de julho de 1681, em Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 67 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hannah Fosdick родилась около 1615 г. в местности грит венам, суффолк, Англия, её отцу по имени Stephen Fosdick было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Anna Harre, 30. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Palmer Tingley в 1635 г. в местности чарльстоун, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла 1 июля 1681 г. в местности малден, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 67 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hannah Fosdick nació aproximadamente 1615, en Great Wenham, Suffolk, Inglaterra, su papá, Stephen Fosdick, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Anna Harre, tenía 30 años. Se casó con Palmer Tingley en 1635, en Charlestown, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 1 de julio de 1681, en Malden, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 67 años.
